title: Maartens — OSU rental-house move-in checklist
html:
Maartens — OSU rental-house move-in checklist

Source: 2023-10-28 Apple Note. Five-line move-in checklist for Maartens — a Corvallis rental house Yahir was setting up with roommates senior year. Captures the housing-admin layer that rarely shows up in his vault.

TL;DR

  • Five action items: split utilities, add basement chore (rotation), $300 (deposit / monthly share?), change door code, swap bank account.
  • Likely written the day of or just after move-in — the door-code + bank-account swap reads like new-tenant turnover.
  • "Maartens" = the house name (probably the landlord/owner surname) — same housing-by-landlord-name convention common in college towns.
  • One of the only logistics-only notes in his 2023 corpus — most other entries are reflective / aspirational.
  • The $300 line is ambiguous: utility share, deposit fraction, or monthly furniture-fund — he didn't disambiguate at write time.

Pattern

Notable as the rare operational note in 2023. Rest of the year is dominated by manifesto / relationship / travel content. This is the only senior-year roommate-admin trace.

Open questions

  • Who else was in the Maartens house? (Roommate names not in note; likely Ayden / Owen cluster but not confirmed.)
  • Was Maartens his senior-year residence or a shorter rental?
  • Is the $300 a monthly recurring or one-time?

Related

  • osu
  • ayden
  • owen davis
  • 2024 12 10 osu graduation
